_morning_resolved: ✅ GDCU-8877 (Phone Numbers Admin Panel, Novica) — Done today 07/05. Morning review item cleared.
✅ GDCU-8736 (Learning Hub Imagery, Ciara) — Done today 07/05. Sign-off complete; unblocked GDCU-8951 (Apply Feedback to Learning Hub Phase 2, Carlos now In Progress).
✅ GDCU-8928 (IUJ Banners, Jessica) — Done today 07/05 at 09:30. Outstanding banners decision since 30/04 resolved.
✅ GDCU-8947 (Cosmo Cash Machine Images, Ciara) — Done today 07/05 at 10:54.

action_items.action: RESPOND NOW — LIVE DESIGN SYSTEM GROUP DM (Ciara / Miguel / Jessica / Mike, last message 13:23 BST). Three open questions need Mike's direction urgently: (1) Jessica is asking whether slot-game-theme images from the existing Figma Product Features file are acceptable to reuse for the WC Predictor quiz — confirm yes/no so design can proceed on GDCU-8935 (target Tue 12/05, 5 days away). (2) Miguel is asking what the fallback icon library should be when a GDC DS icon doesn't exist (Tailwind, Heroicons, Material?), and flagging that ~10 unexpected purple shades have appeared in the DS — are these correct or an error? (3) Jessica needs clear written guidelines on where gradients are acceptable (banners/hero sections). This conversation is blocking active design work. Respond to channel C0ACZMNE17V.

GDCU-8619 STILL BLOCKED — Day 21. Operator List Redesign (Ciara Carroll) shows status 'In Progress / Blocked' as of end-of-day 06/05. Despite Michael Butlin attending today's product sync, no ticket update or Slack message from Ciara indicates a resolution was reached. Escalate to Colin Brannigan today — this is now 3+ weeks blocked. Be specific: state the exact decision required (approve one of the 3 mobile-first grid-format operator list iterations). If Colin cannot compel Michael Butlin, this needs to go on the formal risk register.

REVIEW & SIGN OFF — GDCU-8948 Update Ratio of Prize Boxes (5th Box, Cosmo Spins), Jessica Dordevic, In Product, NEW today. Jessica commented this morning (07/05 09:38) with implementation notes: duplicate the 5th HTML element, width auto adjusts fine, looks good on desktop and mobile. One flag: horizontal scroll currently kicks in at ~700px — she recommends ~1000px as the threshold. Review her screenshots and either approve or confirm the scroll breakpoint fix needed before this goes to dev. Stakeholders: Shaun Cronin, Ciara, Miguel.

REVIEW & SIGN OFF — GDCU-8806 In-App Age Gate 18+ Verification (Carlos Blauth, In Product since 06/05). Carlos posted a full implementation summary (06/05 15:16): DOB-picker on launch, 24h cooldown on failed verification, single-use 'wrong date' override, SharedPreferences persistence, Supabase sync on sign-in, dedicated Settings screen with reset, Privacy Policy and T&Cs on 5 surfaces. Android APK attached. This is an Apple Guideline 5.3 and Google Play compliance requirement — needed for app store submission. Review and sign off today to keep QA unblocked.

SCHEDULE WC KO CALL — Still not evidenced as scheduled. Group Bets design target is TOMORROW (Thu 08/05). If design lands on time, the KO call with devs must go on the calendar for Fri 09/05 or Mon 11/05 at the latest. This was agreed with Chloe on 05/05. Hard deadline is 11 June. Send the calendar invite today so devs are locked in the moment design is approved.

REVIEW — GDCU-8956 Image Graphic Project Assistant [Claude Chat] (Ciara Carroll, In Product, NEW today 07/05 12:15). Ciara has moved this to In Product and shared a Claude project link plus the HPC Banner Guidelines Confluence page, tagging Chloe Christie and Josh Smith. Context: not all editors have ChatGPT access — the logo generator prompt/guide for HPC pages needs to move to the GDC Claude design system org. Mike is a named stakeholder. Review the Claude project setup and confirm it meets the brief before Ciara finalises it.

VIC DADSON — Still no contact today (07/05). Extended sick leave until 16/05 (confirmed in yesterday's afternoon report). No Slack messages from Vic since 21/04. Carry-forward from morning. Assess data engineering coverage gap for the period — Nemanja reqs and BI knowledge-sharing from Chris are on hold. Brief Colin on the situation if not already discussed in today's context.

CONFIRM MIGUEL STATUS ON WC PREDICTOR DESIGN — Miguel was active in the group DM today (13:00 BST), but Jess's question about sports images for the quiz suggests image direction for GDCU-8935 is still unclear. Confirm: (1) Does Miguel have a clear brief? (2) Has he started design? (3) Is the 12/05 target still realistic? Resolve the image direction question from the group DM now and feed the answer back to both Miguel and Jess.

KARL CHECK-IN — Outstanding from morning. Confirm data readiness for WC: fixture dating, resulting, Group Bets matrix input. Mike told Chloe on 05/05 he has a check-in with Karl 'this week to confirm'. It is now Thursday afternoon — send a message to Karl today so the devs have accurate data assumptions when the KO call happens.

GDCU-8810 BLOCKED — Set Up Organisation Level Developer Accounts for Apple/Google (Harden Thomas Wallace, In Progress, Blocked, updated 06/05). This is a prerequisite for publishing the GDC F2P app and is directly related to GDCU-8806 (Age Gate, now In Product). Identify what is blocking the account setup and either action it or assign clear ownership to unblock Harden.

GDCU-8546 TINDER WIDGET — Still not confirmed as deprioritised in the sprint. Mike told Chloe on 05/05 to remove the Tinder widget until further notice and replace with Group Bets. Update the ticket status and confirm the sprint plan reflects this decision. No evidence this was actioned after today's product sync.

GDCU-8846 COSMO SPINS SPRING AD CAMPAIGN — Creative direction still needed (Ciara Carroll, To Do). Josh Kerr feedback: clearer message, less 'gaming' feel required. Ciara's plate is lighter today with GDCU-8736 and GDCU-8947 resolved, but GDCU-8619 remains blocked and GDCU-8956 is now In Product. Provide direction before end of day so this doesn't age further.

INTAKE FORM — Gabriel Cornoiu's suggestions from 23/04 (SEO & IA for new pages/hubs; operator offer attributes) still unconfirmed. Gabriel not active in visible channels today. Confirm the intake form has been updated.

Jessica commented this morning with implementation notes — duplicate the 5th HTML element, width auto adjusts fine across screens. One concern flagged: horizontal scroll currently starts at ~700px; she recommends ~1000px. Mike needs to review Jessica's screenshots and approve or clarify the mobile scroll threshold fix required before dev proceeds.

In Product since 06/05 15:18. Carlos implemented full DOB-picker age gate with 24h cooldown on failed attempts, single-use 'wrong date' override, SharedPreferences persistence, Supabase sync, dedicated Settings screen, and Privacy/T&C links on 5 surfaces. Android APK attached to the ticket. Apple Guideline 5.3 and Google Play compliance requirement — blocks app store submission. Needs Mike's sign-off before QA.

NEW today (07/05 12:15). Ciara set up a Claude project for the HPC logo generator (moved from ChatGPT — not all editors have access) and posted the project link plus HPC Banner Guidelines, tagging Chloe and Josh. Mike is a named stakeholder. Review the Claude project setup and confirm this approach is correct before Ciara finalises and rolls it out to editors.

Day 21 Blocked (since 16/04/2026). Michael Butlin attended today's product sync but the ticket remains unchanged as of this report. No Slack activity from Ciara today. 3 mobile-first grid-format iterations are ready and waiting for a decision. Escalate to Colin Brannigan immediately — this is the longest-standing blocker on the board and is now a sprint planning risk.
